youtube_title: Belgium 1-1 Egypt: Lukaku Forced an Equaliser 22 Seconds After Coming On
youtube_description: Romelu Lukaku came off the bench and within 22 seconds his cross forced the own goal that rescued Belgium, who were held 1-1 by Egypt in Group G at the 2026 World Cup. Emam Ashour put Egypt ahead, De Bruyne hit the post, and Courtois kept Belgium in it. Both favourites level on a point. No-footage, original-graphic recap. Subscribe for daily World Cup stories. #worldcup2026 #belgium #egypt
